rationale: Builds on the current late projection EMA path, but replaces the fixed all-EMA handoff with a cheap post-training train-split calibration pass that greedily chooses live-vs-EMA projection blocks after exact roundtrip. This directly targets final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact behavior without touching validation, keeps the 600s budget intact, and trims unused helper code to stay lean.
title: Train-Calibrated Projection EMA Finalizer
